name: Tray.ai
description: AI-ready iPaaS platform with Merlin Agent Builder for building and deploying autonomous agents. Includes pre-built agent accelerators (ITSM, HR, Knowledge, Support) and integrations with 1M+ applications.
capabilities: ITSM agent for IT support automation
HR agent for policy automation, PTO, profile updates
Support agent for customer issue resolution
notes: Gartner Magic Quadrant Visionary (2026). Built on AI-ready integration platform. Agent Accelerators pre-built for common enterprise workflows. Emphasis on taking direct action, not just triaging.
